summary: Iteration 30 testing complete. All Daily Revenue Widget features and SKAdmin account verified: (1) SKAdmin login with saswata@123 works correctly (role=admin, restaurant_id=rest_demo_1), (2) Dashboard shows Today's Revenue £55.95 with cash/card breakdown (Cash £19.98, Card £35.97), (3) Progress bar shows cash (green) vs card (indigo) split, (4) Last 7 Days bar chart visible with Saturday highlighted, (5) 100% change badge displayed (green, up arrow), (6) All metric cards visible: Orders (2, POS:2/QR:0), Avg Order (£27.98), Tables (3/4), Completed (2), (7) Weekly trend API returns 7 days of data with date/label/total/cash/card/orders, (8) All 11 sidebar navigation links work correctly, (9) Logout preserves last_restaurant_id and PIN toggle appears on login page, (10) Settings > User Management shows green PIN badges for staff with PINs.

issues: Console warning: Chart width/height -1 - recharts container sizing issue (non-blocking, visual only)

critical_code_review_comments: Daily Revenue Widget: AdminDashboard.js correctly calculates pctChange from weeklyTrend.days[5] (yesterday) vs today's total
Cash/Card breakdown: Progress bar uses cashPct = (cashTotal / todayTotal * 100) for visual split
Weekly trend API: reports.py returns 7 days with date, label (day name), total, cash, card, orders
Sidebar navigation: All 11 admin menu items have correct data-testid attributes and navigate properly
PIN toggle: Login.js checks last_restaurant_id from localStorage and calls restaurantHasPins API to show toggle

success_rate.backend: 88% (15/17 passed - 2 failed due to rate limiting 429, not actual bugs)

seed_data_creation: Two completed test orders exist: one cash £19.98, one card £35.97 = £55.95 total
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 30 verified Daily Revenue Widget: (1) Today's Revenue shows £55.95 with cash/card breakdown, (2) Progress bar shows green (cash) and indigo (card) split, (3) Last 7 Days bar chart with Saturday highlighted, (4) 100% change badge (up from yesterday), (5) All metric cards working, (6) Weekly trend API returns 7 days of data, (7) All sidebar navigation works, (8) PIN toggle visible after logout. SKAdmin account (saswata@123) is working correctly.

skadmin_login.evidence: POST /api/auth/login with SKAdmin/saswata@123 returns 200 with role=admin, restaurant_id=rest_demo_1

daily_revenue_widget.evidence: Dashboard shows Today's Revenue £55.95 with data-testid='daily-revenue-widget'

cash_card_breakdown.evidence: Cash £19.98 (green bar), Card £35.97 (indigo bar) with progress bar visualization

weekly_chart.evidence: Last 7 Days bar chart visible with data-testid='weekly-chart', Saturday highlighted in indigo

percentage_change.evidence: 100% change badge displayed with green background and up arrow (data-testid='revenue-pct-change')

metric_cards.evidence: Orders (2), Avg Order (£27.98), Tables (3/4), Completed (2) all visible

weekly_trend_api.evidence: GET /api/reports/weekly-trend returns 7 days with date, label, total, cash, card, orders

today_stats_api.evidence: GET /api/reports/today returns total_sales, cash_total, card_total, pos_orders, qr_orders, etc.

sidebar_navigation.evidence: All 11 links work: POS Terminal, Dashboard, Kitchen KDS, Orders, Reports, Menu, Tables, Cash Drawer, Printers, Audit Log, Settings

logout_pin_toggle.evidence: Logout preserves last_restaurant_id, PIN toggle (Password/Quick PIN) visible on login page

settings_user_management.evidence: User Management tab shows green PIN badges for restaurant_admin and user (both have PINs set)

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are real. No mocked endpoints.
